title: cyathea alstonii
intro: Cyathea alstonii, also known as the Alston's tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the Cyathea genus and is native to New Zealand and eastern Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyathea alstonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyathea alstonii can be made by drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
